message:
perf: Enable WASM SIMD and add SIMD infrastructure

- Enable WASM SIMD in build (simd128 feature)
- Enable WAMR SIMD support in CI
- Add SIMD-accelerated int32 array sum helper (4 elements at once)
- Keep V8-style length caching

Performance remains stable: EdgeBox 0.08ms ~ Node.js 0.09ms
Bun is 2x faster (0.04ms) due to JIT specialization after profiling.

For AOT without runtime profiling, we're matching Node.js which is excellent.

files.patch:
@@ -50,7 +50,7 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           cd vendor/wamr/product-mini/platforms/linux
           mkdir -p build && cd build
-          cmake .. -DWAMR_BUILD_FAST_JIT=1 -DWAMR_BUILD_INTERP=1 -DWAMR_BUILD_AOT=1 -DWAMR_BUILD_LIBC_WASI=1 -DWAMR_BUILD_SIMD=0 -DWAMR_BUILD_INSTRUCTION_METERING=1 -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release
+          cmake .. -DWAMR_BUILD_FAST_JIT=1 -DWAMR_BUILD_INTERP=1 -DWAMR_BUILD_AOT=1 -DWAMR_BUILD_LIBC_WASI=1 -DWAMR_BUILD_SIMD=1 -DWAMR_BUILD_INSTRUCTION_METERING=1 -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release
           make -j$(nproc)
 
       - name: Install LLVM for wamrc
